2606.10392.title: Instruction Finetuning DeepSeek-R1-8B Model Using LoRA and NEFTune
2606.10392.paper_summary: Financial named-entity recognition (NER) is essential for translating unstructured financial reports and news into structured knowledge graphs. However, general-purpose large language models (LLMs) often misclassify financial entities or ignore domain-specific patterns. This paper investigates the use of DeepSeek-R1-8B, a recent open-source large language model, combined with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) and Noisy Embedding Fine-Tuning (NEFTune) for financial NER. Each annotated sentence in our corpus of 1693 samples is converted into an instruction-input-output triple. We insert lightweight LoRA matrices into the Transformer layers and apply NEFTune to improve generalisation by adding uniform noise to embedding vectors during training. Experiments show that the LoRA-adapted DeepSeek-R1-8B achieves a micro-F1 of 0.901 on seven entity types (Company, Date, Location, Money, Person, Product and Quantity), and adding NEFTune further boosts the micro-F1 to 0.912, outperforming Llama3-8B, Qwen3-8B, Baichuan2-7B, T5 and BERT-Base baselines.
2606.10392.paper_summary_zh: 金融命名實體識別 (NER) 對於將非結構化的財務報告和新聞轉換為結構化知識圖譜至關重要。<lb/>然而，通用的大型語言模型 (LLMs) 通常會錯誤分類財務實體或忽略特定領域的模式。<lb/>本文探討了使用 DeepSeek-R1-8B，這是一個最近的開源大型語言模型，結合低秩適應 (LoRA) 和噪聲嵌入微調 (NEFTune) 進行財務 NER 的方法。<lb/>我們的語料庫中 1693 個樣本的每個標註句子都被轉換為指令-輸入-輸出三元組。<lb/>我們在 Transformer 層中插入輕量級的 LoRA 矩陣，並應用 NEFTune 通過在訓練過程中向嵌入向量添加均勻噪聲來提高泛化能力。<lb/>實驗表明，經過 LoRA 調整的 DeepSeek-R1-8B 在七種類型的實體（公司、日期、地點、金錢、人物、產品和數量）上達到了 0.901 的微 F1 分數，並且添加 NEFTune 進一步將微 F1 提升至 0.912，超越了 Llama3-8B、Qwen3-8B、Baichuan2-7B、T5 和 BERT-Base 的基準。
2606.10392.author: Wu Yuerong et.al.
